name: @inkweld/prosemirror
description: Shared ProseMirror schema, Yjs XML serialization, and Markdown <-> XML conversion for Inkweld.
//: Path mapping in consumer tsconfigs uses bare 'index' (not 'index.ts') so the Angular compiler accepts the imports without allowImportingTsExtensions.
//deps: prosemirror-model and yjs are peerDependencies (host MUST provide them) and devDependencies (so this package's own typecheck/tests can resolve them). They are NOT regular dependencies — that would risk a second copy being installed under the package's own node_modules during isolated workspace installs, breaking class-identity checks in y-prosemirror/ngx-editor/EditorView. Vite's `resolve.dedupe` (in `frontend/vitest-base.config.ts` and the Angular build) ensures only ONE copy is bundled at runtime. See PR #1068.
